description:
The figure illustrates the methodology used to investigate hallucination-associated neurons (H-Neurons) in large language models (LLMs). The diagram follows a top-to-bottom flow, divided into three main sections representing the three perspectives of the study: Identification, Behavioral Impact, and Origins. The background is a clean white.

**Section 1: Identification (Top)**

*   A rounded rectangle labeled "LLM Input" is at the top, filled with a very light gray and a slightly darker gray border. An arrow points downwards from this box.
*   A second, slightly larger rounded rectangle, colored a soft sky blue with a slightly darker blue border, is labeled "LLM Inference" in bold sans-serif text. It contains a stylized 2D brain icon in its center, suggesting neural processing.
*   An arrow, thicker than the others (line weight 2pt), points downwards from the "LLM Inference" box to a third rounded rectangle.
*   A third rounded rectangle, colored a pale yellow with a slightly darker yellow border, is labeled "H-Neuron Identification" in bold sans-serif text. Inside this box is the text: "< 0.1% of Total Neurons" in a regular sans-serif font. A magnifying glass icon is subtly superimposed on this box, suggesting the identification process.
*   A double-lined arrow (line weight 1.5pt) emerges from the right side of the "H-Neuron Identification" box, leading to a small, circular node labeled "Hallucination Prediction (High Generalization)" in bold sans-serif text. This node is colored a light sage green with a slightly darker green border.

**Section 2: Behavioral Impact (Middle)**

*   A rounded rectangle, colored a warm peach with a slightly darker peach border, is positioned below and slightly to the right of the "H-Neuron Identification" box. It is labeled "Controlled Interventions on H-Neurons" in bold sans-serif text. A small wrench icon is placed inside this box, indicating intervention.
*   An arrow (line weight 2pt) points downwards from the "Controlled Interventions on H-Neurons" box.
*   A rounded rectangle, colored a light rose with a slightly darker rose border, is below the previous box, labeled "Observation of Over-Compliance Behaviors" in bold sans-serif text. A chat bubble icon is within this box.

**Section 3: Origins (Bottom)**

*   A rounded rectangle, colored a light lavender with a slightly darker lavender border, is positioned below the "H-Neuron Identification" box on the left side. It is labeled "Tracing Back to Pre-trained Base Models" in bold sans-serif text. A timeline icon is inside this box.
*   An arrow (line weight 2pt) points downwards from the "Tracing Back to Pre-trained Base Models" box.
*   A rounded rectangle, colored a very light cyan with a slightly darker cyan border, is below the previous box, labeled "Hallucination Detection Prediction (Pre-training)" in bold sans-serif text. A small target icon is inside this box.

**Connections and Overall Flow**

*   All arrows are solid black and have arrowheads indicating direction.
*   The overall flow is top-to-bottom, illustrating the sequence of investigations.
*   The sections are subtly separated by the color scheme, with each section using a distinct pastel color.

**Labels and Annotations**

*   All labels use a clear, sans-serif font.
*   The percentage in the "H-Neuron Identification" box highlights the sparsity of H-Neurons.

**Input/Output**

*   The "LLM Input" box represents the input to the LLM.
*   The "Hallucination Prediction" and "Hallucination Detection Prediction" nodes represent the outputs or findings from the identification and origin analysis respectively. The "Observation of Over-Compliance Behaviors" box represents an observed behavioral impact.
